message:
beads: enrich Phase 2 beads with hybrid search implementation

- meta_skill-mh8: Complete Tantivy BM25 search with schema, indexing,
  and search implementation
- meta_skill-ch6: Hash embeddings (xf-style) with FNV-1a algorithm,
  Embedder trait, vector index storage
- meta_skill-93z: RRF Score Fusion algorithm with implementation,
  filters, and explainability breakdown
- meta_skill-0ki: ms search command with full CLI spec, output formats,
  pipeline diagram, alias/deprecation handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
